title: Day 1. Alphabet warm-up
description: Type the first ten uppercase letters of the English alphabet without spaces.

title: Day 2. Addition and subtraction
description: Solve: 10+5, 5+7, 12-4, 17+8. Write all answers in order without spaces.

title: Day 3. Numbers from 1 to 10
description: Write the numbers from 1 to 10 separated by commas without spaces.

title: Day 4. Simple math
description: Solve: 2+3, 4+2, 9-5, 7-2. Write all answers in order without spaces.

title: Day 5. Number words
description: Write the numbers from 1 to 5 in English lowercase words separated by spaces.

title: Day 6. Even numbers
description: Write all even numbers from 2 to 20 separated by commas without spaces.

title: Day 7. Vowels
description: Write the English vowels in uppercase letters separated by commas without spaces.

title: Day 8. Family word
description: Type the word MOM in uppercase letters.

title: Day 9. Animal word
description: Type the English word for a small furry animal that says meow in lowercase letters.

title: Day 10. Compare numbers
description: Compare the numbers and write only the signs without spaces: 5 ? 3, 2 ? 8, 10 ? 10. Use <, >, or =.

title: Day 11. Math up to 20
description: Solve: 6+4, 9+1, 15-5. Write all answers in order without spaces.

title: Day 12. Colors
description: Write these colors in English lowercase letters separated by commas without spaces: red, blue, green.

title: Day 13. Winter word
description: Type the word WINTER in uppercase letters.

title: Day 14. First alphabet letters
description: Type the first five uppercase letters of the English alphabet without spaces.

title: Day 15. Snow word
description: Type the English word for white winter flakes in lowercase letters.

title: Day 16. Apples
description: You have 3 apples and get 4 more apples. How many apples do you have in total? Write the answer as a number.

title: Day 17. More math
description: Solve: 7+3, 12-2, 5+6. Write all answers in order without spaces.

title: Day 18. Countdown
description: Write the numbers from 5 to 1 in descending order separated by commas without spaces.

title: Day 19. Family word
description: Type the word DAD in uppercase letters.
gift: A drawing from dad or together with dad

title: Day 20. Alphabet start
description: Type the first five uppercase letters of the English alphabet without spaces.
gift: Bright letter sticker for a notebook

title: Day 21. One more
description: Write the answers without spaces: 3+1, 6+1, 9+1.
gift: Choose a short cartoon for the evening

title: Day 22. One less
description: Write the answers without spaces: 5-1, 10-1, 8-1.

title: Day 23. Tens
description: Write these numbers as digits separated by commas without spaces: ten, twenty, thirty.

title: Day 24. Winter words
description: Write these winter words in lowercase letters separated by commas without spaces: snow, tree, gift.

title: Day 25. Math with zero
description: Solve: 5+0, 0+7, 9-0. Write all answers in order without spaces.

title: Day 26. Addition up to 10
description: Solve: 1+2, 3+4, 2+5. Write all answers in order without spaces.

title: Day 27. Animals
description: Write these animals in lowercase letters separated by commas without spaces: cat, dog, fox.

title: Day 28. Tree ornaments
description: There are 4 ornaments on the tree. Mom adds 6 more. How many ornaments are there now? Write the answer as a number.
gift: Choose or draw a new tree ornament

title: Day 29. Sentence practice
description: Type this sentence exactly: I am six.

title: Day 30. Final math
description: Solve: 20-5, 3+7, 9+9. Write all answers in order without spaces.
